data.title: Ludi Jian Xian
data.synopsis:
The top of the immortals, proud of the world, as long as my ancestor An is there, there is the sky. There are three million sword immortals in the world, and they must bow their heads when they meet me. As a sword immortal, I should suppress all enemies in the world. Who claims to be invincible, who claims to be undefeated?

(Source: iQIYI)

data.title: Wind Breaker Season 2
data.synopsis:
Ever since Haruka Sakura joined Furin High School, where its students call themselves Bofurin and protect the town of Makochi, he has gained new friends despite his initial skepticism. Now starting to learn how to fight alongside his classmates and slowly growing out of his solitary past, Sakura has become the grade captain of the first-years.

Sakura's skills are put to the test when he and his classmates are faced with KEEL—a delinquent group known for its ruthless violence and coercion. While KEEL seems to be another rowdy group at first glance, their sudden appearance and strength in numbers might just be hiding a greater evil behind it. With all the odds against the Bofurin members, Sakura must accept that recognizing his shortcomings and receiving help from his upperclassmen will be necessary to preserve the peace in Makochi.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Wind Breaker Season 2 aired on MBS and TBS' Super Animeism Turbo block. The series was released on Blu-ray and DVD in six volumes from June 18, 2025, to November 26, 2025.

data.title: Bad Girl
data.synopsis:
High school first year Yuu Yuutani has always been a good girl, following the rules, helping out around her house, and generally going through life unnoticed. From afar, she reveres her upperclassman and the school's Public Decency Officer, Atori Mizutori, and desperately wants her attention. When she realizes that the best way to get Atori to notice her is to be a delinquent, she begins to dress differently: she dyes parts of her hair a bright red, wears clips on her ears to resemble piercings, and attaches jumbo erasers to her shoes to give them thicker soles.

Despite Yuu's best efforts and even with the advice of her "natural born delinquent" friend Suzu Suzukaze, all of her plans to be a bad girl go awry. Still, Yuu manages to befriend Atori and pledges to spend as much time as possible together, not knowing there are others vying for Atori's attention. In the process, Yuu has also gained the attention of the school's self-proclaimed idol, Rura Ruriha, filling her once-invisible life with more attention than she may be able to handle.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Once Upon a Witch's Death: The Tale of the One Thousand Tears of Joy

data.title: Aru Majo ga Shinu Made
title_synonyms: Once Upon a Witch's Death: The Tale of the One Thousand Tears of Joy
data.synopsis:
Magic is all Meg Raspberry has ever known. Being raised by Faust, the Eternal Witch, Meg wishes to become a witch as great as her master. However, her life crumbles on her 17th birthday when Faust delivers the worst news possible: Meg has one year left to live. Due to a congenital curse, after turning 18, she will age a thousand times faster than normal and then die in mere days.

Faust tells Meg there is a way to cure her affliction: she needs to consume a seed of life. In order to create the seed, Meg must collect a thousand tears of joy within 12 months. Although she is distraught by the difficulty of the task at hand, Meg nonetheless embarks on the journey to prolong her life, meeting countless people with their own stories to tell.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: オーイ！とんぼ 第2期

data.title: Ooi! Tonbo 2nd Season
data.title_japanese: オーイ！とんぼ 第2期
data.synopsis:
After graduating middle school, Tonbo Ooi sets sail from the isolated island of Tokara to Kumamoto in hopes of advancing her golf career. Using his connections, Tonbo's mentor Kazuyoshi Igarashi is able to convince coach Hajime Udou to train her. While Tonbo initially has trouble showing off her abilities with her peculiar playstyle and inexperience with using a variety of golf clubs, she quickly proves her worth at her course debut by making use of her unique skills.

Leaving an impression on Hajime and the people around her, Tonbo is sent to compete in the Kyushu Women's Championship. Met with familiar faces and new rivals, she is determined to dive deeper into the professional world of golf.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: 魔法の姉妹ルルットリリィ

data.title: Mahou no Shimai Lulutto Lilly
data.title_japanese: 魔法の姉妹ルルットリリィ
data.synopsis:
Fuu Nonoyama and Rui Nonoyama are sisters from a "land of magic," who were once on terms with one another, but have drifted apart. Suddenly, they are given magical powers by two cat-like spirits, Uguisu and Azuki, allowing them to transform into magical girl idols. However, there is a catch: these powers only last for a year and they cannot tell anyone that that magic exists. While neither Fuu nor Rui knows one another are magical girls, they soon begin their careers as idols.

(Source: Wikipedia)

data.title: Kaijuu 8-gou 2nd Season
data.synopsis:
Following the massive operation that led to the confinement of recent recruit Kafka Hibino, otherwise known as Kaijuu No. 8, the Defense Force has been puzzled by how to deal with him. Kafka is the first kaijuu to side with humans, and after careful consideration, he is eventually transferred to the Defense Force's First Division in the hope of adding his power to the strongest division, capable of handling any threat. However, some people are still doubtful about Kafka, and he must prove his worth in the next mission.

Kafka and the First Division are soon dispatched when a massive horde of ant-like kaijuu begins wreaking havoc. Thanks to the combined strength of Kafka's friend Kikoru Shinomiya and their captain, Gen Narumi, the mission seems to progress as it should. However, when Kafka fails to transform into his kaijuu form, the dreadful Kaijuu No. 9 joins the battle with only one goal—to eliminate him and steal his power. Although the situation is looking grim, Kafka must overcome his most difficult trial yet with the others if he wants to keep pursuing his dream: fighting side by side with his childhood friend and Third Division captain, Mina Ashiro.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Zhui Xu 2nd Season
data.synopsis: Second season of Zhui Xu.

data.title: Guai Xiang Shou
data.synopsis:
Wei Ran, a college graduate, was accidentally led into a world he never thought existed by a cat. When he was trying to find a way to return home, he learned that the only train that could take him back to the human world would only arrive in half a year. He could only temporarily live in the shop run by Mao Mao Yaya - Guaixiang Sale. Just when life seemed to be settling down, Wei Ran unexpectedly discovered that no matter where he went, dragon scales would appear. And every time the dragon scales appear, it causes completely different strange effects... 

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

titles.title: Min Diao Ju Yi Wen Lu: Bai Fa Shen La
民调局异闻录之白发沈辣
Min Diao Ju Yi Wen Lu 2nd Season
民调局异闻录 第2季

data.title: Bai Fa Shen La
title_synonyms: Min Diao Ju Yi Wen Lu: Bai Fa Shen La
民调局异闻录之白发沈辣
Min Diao Ju Yi Wen Lu 2nd Season
民调局异闻录 第2季
data.synopsis:
Shen La, a special investigator of the "Poll Bureau" of the mysterious incident management agency, was seriously injured in the execution of his mission. When he was about to die, he accepted the inheritance of Wu Rendi, the director of the Sixth Office - a "seed" containing mysterious power. After regaining consciousness, Wu Rendi's senior brother Guangren accepted him as his disciple. In order to find the fragments of the Tianli Diagram, Shen La, after going through the Tianshan Wolf Tomb, energy backlash, foundation conspiracy and other incidents, was finally recognized by Wu Rendi and received the ancient artifact-the Twin Swords of Crime and Punishment given by him. At the same time, the problem of the insider in the polling bureau became more complicated and confusing, and Shen La and her partner Sun Desheng went into battle again.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Er Dong Shui Shou's (耳东水寿) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Long Zhong Ren
data.synopsis:
Fei Xingkong and Sirui suddenly found themselves living in a comic cage, and they wanted to escape back to the real world. However, facing the absolute control of the "author", the two were forced to flee in the unpredictable world of the story... 

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

data.title: Xi Jing Sushe
data.synopsis:
Bai Junyan, a neighbor's white lotus with the fragrance of tea; Luo Ben, a flower of wealth in the world with eyes higher than the top. The two drama queens were assigned to the same dormitory and joined the same drama club. In front of them, there appeared the sophomore drama club senior and iceberg male god Gao Shu, and his mysterious roommate Ouyang who is highly socially afraid... At this point, the actors on the stage have gathered. Will they take off their masks and be honest? treat each other; or will they each show their special powers and create a campus drama of intrigue?

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

titles.title: Three Kingdoms Kill: Taiping Heavenly Book

data.title: Sanguo Sha: Taiping Tianshu
data.title_english: Three Kingdoms Kill: Taiping Heavenly Book
data.synopsis:
The Grand Prize Challenge was born, and the talented player Guo Xiaoye, who had been suspended for two years due to a frame-up, once again challenged the top. In order to prove that he has regained his original intention, he and his natural general Guo Jia passed the test, but discovered a shocking conspiracy during the game - the damage in the game can actually be transmitted to real players!

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Tsuyoki
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Tsuyoki by V.W.P.

titles.title: Sex ga Suki de Suki de Daisuki na Classmate no Ano Musume
セックスが好きで好きで大好きなクラスメイトのあの娘

data.title: Sex ga Suki de Suki de Daisuki na Classmate no Ano Musume
data.title_japanese: セックスが好きで好きで大好きなクラスメイトのあの娘
data.synopsis:
Sakurai Taichi, facing a financial crunch, lands a job as an assistant on a film shoot where he reunites with his schoolmate and the most beautiful girl in school, Himawari Kanan. To his surprise, the shoot turns out to be for an adult video, which initially shocks Taichi, who tries to decline the offer. However, Kanan accepts the role, claiming it will be an educational experience. Despite feeling uncomfortable with Kanan's bold actions, Taichi finds enjoyment in working alongside her. During the shoot, the lead actor has an accident, and Taichi steps in to replace him, which leads Kanan to also participate in the video.

(Source: TMDB)

titles.title: Fuuto Tantei Movie: Kamen Rider Skull no Shouzou
劇場版 風都探偵 仮面ライダースカルの肖像
Fuuto PI: The Portrait of Kamen Rider Skull

data.title: Fuuto Tantei Movie: Kamen Rider Skull no Shouzou
data.title_english: Fuuto PI: The Portrait of Kamen Rider Skull
data.title_japanese: 劇場版 風都探偵 仮面ライダースカルの肖像
data.synopsis:
"How were Gaia Memories created?" "Why did W begin to fight?" To answer Tokime's questions, Shoutarou quietly begins to tell a story. He speaks of his meeting and parting with a man he admired and called his old man—his mentor, Soukichi Narumi.

Mysterious people called Dopants, who utilized the powers of Gaia Memories, had begun appearing in the shadows of Fuuto, the windy city. A young Shoutarou had become an assistant of the detective Soukichi and, though called half-baked, began to follow in his footsteps. Unaware that, in addition to his detective work, Soukichi was secretly acting as Skull, Shoutarou began to grow frustrated with his mentor. That was when the Narumi Detective Agency received a phone call—a request from Hell inviting Shoutarou and company to a fateful night! When Shoutarou tracked down Soukichi to deliver the "trump card" bestowed by the mysterious caller, what did he see?

Shoutarou and Philip. The one detective made of two and the night when Kamen Rider W began. That whole story will finally be revealed.

(Source: Official site, translated)
